Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Haiqing Qiu, 415-568-6784 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Mandarin Court Interpreter Ai Dong Ni assists Plaintiff.
Tim Fama, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant City And County Of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff argues and requests to revoke the protective order. The Court informs Plaintiff the protective order is expired.
(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Sustain without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Haiqing Qiu, 415-568-6784 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Sheila Johnson, Deputy Cuty Attorney, 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. There is no available Court Cantonese Interpreter to assist the Plaintiff today. Plaintiff hands a copy of its brief to the Court. The Court announces it did not receive a contest email and shares its views. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Continued to 1/28/20 at 9;30 am in Dept. 302. The Court will ask its clerk to help with informal interpretation. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
